channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-05-12 17:57 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Maye Musk on Elon’s early days: "I knew he was a genius and a good person, so I knew he would want t...
item.description: Maye Musk on Elon’s early days: "I knew he was a genius and a good person, so I knew he would want to do something good. I invested in Zip2 to keep them going On my 50th birthday, they gave me a little toy house and a little toy car and said, 'We're going to give you one day!' We were all struggling… but after they sold Zip2, I got a real home and a real car" ❤️

item.title: @elonmusk: Jensen Huang: "I was lucky because I had known Elon Musk, and I helped him build the first computer ...
item.description: Jensen Huang: "I was lucky because I had known Elon Musk, and I helped him build the first computer for Model 3, the Model S, and when he wanted to start working on autonomous vehicle."

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok just previewed “Skills” and it's so next level it's not even funny You tell it: “Create a skill...
item.description: Grok just previewed “Skills” and it's so next level it's not even funny You tell it: “Create a skill that grabs latest AI news from@testingcatalog”@Grokbuilds the WHOLE thing, behavior, instructions, files. Then just trigger it for clean daily updates

item.title: @elonmusk: Why is it always "seize the means of production" and never "create the means of production"?
item.description: Why is it always "seize the means of production" and never "create the means of production"?

item.title: @elonmusk: Starship’s cargo bay delivers 1,000+ cubic meters of usable volume The entire International Space St...
item.description: Starship’s cargo bay delivers 1,000+ cubic meters of usable volume The entire International Space Station has a pressurized volume of 1,005 m³ It took 42 assembly flights and over $150 billion across 13+ years to build Starship can deliver more volume than the entire ISS in a single flight For context, a single payload bay can hold: → The interior volume of a massive 5-bedroom house → The volume of 20+ standard shipping containers → Entire space station modules (fully assembled) → Over two dozen Cybertrucks → Multiple Boeing 737 fuselage sections → 100+ large satellites with room to spare And it is 18 meters tall....meaning you can stack an entire 5-story building inside it And it is fully reusable. Launch the next massive telescope. Or an entire space station. Or the next Mars habitat All possible in a single flight This is why Starship is pure engineering magic

item.title: @elonmusk: Maye Musk on Elon: He wants to leave the world in a better place than he found it “People often misu...
item.description: Maye Musk on Elon: He wants to leave the world in a better place than he found it “People often misunderstand Elon. He’s not motivated by money or fame—he’s motivated by the idea of improving humanity. Whether it’s making electric cars mainstream, reducing the risk of human extinction through space exploration, or ensuring the free flow of information on platforms like X, his goal has always been the same—to leave the world in a better place than he found it.”

item.title: @elonmusk: Launch rehearsal complete. During a flight-like countdown, more than 5,000 metric tonnes (11+ millio...
item.description: Launch rehearsal complete. During a flight-like countdown, more than 5,000 metric tonnes (11+ million pounds) of propellant were loaded on the fully stacked Starship and Super Heavy V3 vehicles for the first time

item.title: @elonmusk: Falcon 9 is vertical at pad 40 in Florida ahead of tomorrow’s launch of Dragon’s 34th Commercial Res...
item.description: Falcon 9 is vertical at pad 40 in Florida ahead of tomorrow’s launch of Dragon’s 34th Commercial Resupply Services mission to the@Space_Station. Teams are keeping an eye on weather, which is currently 35% favorable for liftoff→spacex.com/launches/crs-34

item.title: @elonmusk: Last week, the United States refused to participate in the UN’s review of the Global Compact on Migr...
item.description: Last week, the United States refused to participate in the UN’s review of the Global Compact on Migration. The United States objects to the Global Compact on Migration and UN efforts to facilitate replacement migration to the United States and our Western allies.

item.title: @elonmusk: Watch Falcon 9 launch the@NRO_govand@USSF_SSC’s NROL-172 mission from pad 4E in Californiaxcancel.co...
item.description: Watch Falcon 9 launch the@NRO_govand@USSF_SSC’s NROL-172 mission from pad 4E in Californiaxcancel.com/i/broadcasts/1AKEmOQmW…

item.title: @elonmusk: Falcon 9’s first stage lands on the Of Course I Still Love You droneship
item.description: Falcon 9’s first stage lands on the Of Course I Still Love You droneship

item.title: @elonmusk: Falcon 9 launches NROL-172 to orbit from pad 4E in California
item.description: Falcon 9 launches NROL-172 to orbit from pad 4E in California

item.title: @elonmusk: "More capitalist countries have lower income inequality, not higher. High income inequality is cause...
item.description: "More capitalist countries have lower income inequality, not higher. High income inequality is caused by cronyism which goes hand in hand with highly regulated markets."

item.title: @elonmusk: It’s release day!!! Suicidal Empathy is out into the world.
item.description: It’s release day!!! Suicidal Empathy is out into the world.

item.title: @elonmusk: AfD bei 28%, inzwischen hat sich der Abstand zur Union (22%) auf 6 Punkte vergrößert. Gleichzeitig s...
item.description: AfD bei 28%, inzwischen hat sich der Abstand zur Union (22%) auf 6 Punkte vergrößert. Gleichzeitig sinkt auch das Verständnis für die "Brandmauer". Deutschland will den Wandel - wir sind dafür bereit.
